calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-31-2013 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-04-2012 Set For Trial On Jul-01-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-06-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No Appearance. Tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT CITIBANK, N.A., AS TRUSTEE, BANK OF AMERICA N.A.,and RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend 1) No opposition filed. 2) Inability to read English doesn't toll statute of limitations. Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Smith, Not reported (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-03-2012 Continued To Dec-19-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-02-2012 Continued To Oct-17-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-06-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kerry K. Galusha (415-659-4896) of Reed Smith for Citibank, Bank of America and Recontrust Company, defendants and moving parties / Alice Purdy (510-461-8955) Law Offices of Alice Purdy, specially appearing for Fredy Martinez, plaintiff and opposing party

ARGUED - Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTs CITIBANK, BANK OF AMERICA and RECONTRUST COMPANY's DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is overruled as to the first cause of action. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to causes of action second (to allege injury in fact, i.e. loss of property or money paid), third (to allege facts showing SOL tolling; requisite particularity; and reliance) and fourth (to allege facts showing SOL tolling and actionable conduct after contract inception). Defendant to prepare order. Judge Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: M. Smith, Not Reported (501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-22-2012 Continued To Aug-15-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-05-2012 Continued To Jul-06-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No Appearance. Tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANTs CITIBANK, BANK OF AMERICA and RECONTRUST COMPANY's DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT is continued to July 6, 2012, on court's own motion. Judge Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: M. Smith, Not Reported (501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-20-2012 Continued To Jul-05-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
